mapper.insert: INSERT INTO peering_history ( peering_connection_id, peering_name, csp_type, requester_vpc_id, requester_cidr, requester_account_id, requester_route_table_id, accepter_vpc_id, accepter_cidr, accepter_account_id, accepter_route_table_id, accepter_security_group_id, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{peeringConnectionId}, #{peeringName}, #{cspType}, #{requesterVpcId}, #{requesterCidr}, #{requesterAccountId}, #{requesterRouteTableId}, #{accepterVpcId}, #{accepterCidr}, #{accepterAccountId}, #{accepterRouteTableId}, #{accepterSecurityGroupId}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM peering_history WHERE status = #{status}
